name_cn:
【Blue Round Label New Size】
Dior Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish item for posing ♡ Exquisite embroidery perfectly presents a look that adds a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini is so cute! The small size is also convenient for holding small bits and pieces~ Who uses it is stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Model: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
